mapper.sql: A.MTGRUM_ID AS mtgPlaceId , A.MTGRUM_NM AS mtgPlaceNm , A.OPN_BEGIN_TM AS opnBeginTm , A.OPN_END_TM AS opnEndTm , A.ACEPTNC_POSBL_NMPR AS aceptncPosblNmpr , A.LC_SE AS lcSe , A.LC_DETAIL AS lcDetail , A.ATCH_FILE_ID AS atchFileId , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID AS lastUpdusrId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_MTG_PLACE_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.MTGRUM_NM LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_MTG_PLACE_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
